privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated FAT32 disk image created dynamically by setup_task.sh at /home/ga/evidence/hidden_files.dd. The script specifically creates 6 files and explicitly sets the DOS hidden attribute (+h) on two of them: finances.csv and password.txt. The remaining 4 files do not have this attribute. This comprehensively verifies the ground truth. All metadata claims exactly match the task instructions, setup generation scripts, and verifier logic.
